Let's Work Together

Book a Session

Ready to make something together? Send me a message and we'll figure out the details — type of session, timeline, location, and pricing.

Get in Touch

Click below to open a pre-filled email. Fill in whatever details you have — I'll get back to you within a day or two.

Send an Email →

What to Include

Type of Session

Portraits, headshots, family, engagement, landscape, event — let me know what you have in mind.

Timeline

A rough date range or a specific date works. Weekends book fast, so the sooner the better.

Location

Have a place in mind? Share it. Not sure? I can suggest spots based on the look you want.

Your Vision

A mood, a reference photo, a vibe — any direction helps me show up prepared.

Common Questions

How far in advance should I book?

A few weeks is usually fine for individual sessions. Larger events and busy seasons (spring/fall) book faster — two months ahead is a safe buffer.

Where do you shoot?

On location anywhere in Wisconsin. I come to you — outdoor spaces, your home, or a spot with meaning to you.

How long until I get my photos?

Most sessions are delivered within one to two weeks. Larger events may take a bit longer.

What if the weather is bad?

We reschedule — no penalty. Wisconsin weather is unpredictable and I want your session to look its best.

Emily Doud Photography

Warm, botanical, and intentional — portrait, lifestyle, and landscape photography in Wisconsin.
